## What & why

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? Link any related issue with #id. -->

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs`)
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] mizlint check change (new or updated detection)

## Affected area

- [ ] mizlint CLI / checks (`tools/`)
- [ ] Skills (`skills/`)
- [ ] Agents (`agents/`)
- [ ] Knowledge base (`knowledge/`)
- [ ] Plugin / marketplace manifests

## Checklist

- [ ] The mizlint test suite passes (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md))
- [ ] `claude plugin validate plugins/dcs-mission-tools` passes (if manifests, skills or agents changed)
- [ ] Commits follow the semantic format `type(scope): description`
- [ ] No personal paths, secrets, or private mission data committed
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed (README, checks reference, knowledge base)

## Notes for reviewers
